title: poa supina
intro: Poa supina, also known as bluegrass or smooth meadow grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant has been found to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Poa supina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other minor health issues.
